title.en: How did the Terrans do it?

content.en:
The changes in the human race are naturally known to other cosmic races in the vicinity.

In a short period of time, the supremes of the human race were born one by one, which even aroused the jealousy of many cosmic clans, because the speed of the birth of the supreme was too terrifying, even many times faster than that of the gods and demons.

But they were helpless, they didn't dare to deal with the Terrans at all, and they couldn't suppress the rise of the Terrans.

Protoss.

The First Divine Lord also received the Terran information collected by the Protoss, and after reading it, he was extremely shocked.

"What, it's only been a long time, and dozens of supreme !! have been born in the human race."

The First Divine Lord was a little incredulous, even the Protoss couldn't cultivate so many Supremes in a short period of time, unless he could do it by consuming all the treasures and foundations of the Protoss.

How did the Terrans do it?

"Forget it, the strength of the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws has surpassed me, even if the Terran has a big secret, the Protoss can't help the Terran!"

The First Divine Lord sighed.

It's like when the Ten Thousand Races Alliance went to confront the Lord of the Yuangu, but the Lord of the Yuangu killed a group of Supremes in one move, if he didn't have a life-saving thing, he could remain immortal once, otherwise he would have died completely.

He didn't know if Ye Tian had reached the first-class supreme, even if he didn't, if the supremes of the Protoss all attacked the human race, the consequences would be very tragic, and even a complete defeat.

Besides, there is no need for the Protoss to deal with the Terrans.

Immediately, the First Divine Lord gave an order not to care about the Terrans, and not to make any moves against the Terrans.

He was worried that the other Supremes or Heavenly Lords would take the initiative to deal with the Terrans, and that would be to make trouble for him.

......

The universe, on an ordinary star of the Gaoshan clan.

A figure suddenly appeared.

"Finally become an Earth Venerable!"

The man muttered.

He is a member of the Tibetan God Organization, and his code name is No. 2, and No. 2 does not mean that his strength is second, this code name is random.

His real name is Zhang Ling, and he is definitely not weak in the realm of the Tibetan God Organization.

Ever since the Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras searched for them, he had been hiding in this secret realm, silently improving his strength.

Now, he has finally stepped into the realm of Earth Venerable with a foundation that is not weak, and he has exhausted his resources to refine his physical body to be very strong, plus some secret techniques he has mastered, his strength is definitely not weaker than some second-class supremes in this universe.

It's a pity that in the absence of sufficient resources, he can't raise his strength to the rank of a first-class supreme or even surpass the ranks of a first-class supreme.

"Damn the Lord of the Ancient Ages, he's just a pawn of our Hidden God Organization, and he dares to hunt down and kill us, the members of the Hidden God Organization!"

Zhang Ling said coldly.

However, the Lord of the Yuan Gu did not know about the existence of the Tibetan God Organization before, and their Venerable did not tell the Lord of the Yuan Gu about the Tibetan God Organization.

Therefore, it is normal for the Lord of the Yuan Gu to hunt them down.

And he can't say that the Lord of the Yuan Gu is a pawn of the Tibetan God Organization, if the relationship is explained, since the Lord of the Yuan Gu asked the Lord of the Yuan Gu to help carry out the dual universe transcendence plan, why did he let the reincarnated person descend into the universe and keep it a secret from them?

Besides, the Lord of the Yuan Gu and that Venerable were only in partnership, and these Supremes were not loyal at all, and it didn't do much to say it.

"I've become an Earth Venerable, and I'm able to contact the Venerable!"

Zhang Ling muttered.

Tear and pull!

Zhang Ling tore through the void, broke through the infinite space, and came to the cosmic barrier.

Zhang Ling looked at the rules of the cosmic barrier and said, "It is said that in the universe, only those who are transcendent can break the cosmic barrier and enter the chaos. If I don't have detachment, even if I force myself into the chaos by special means, I will die instantly! I have now been reincarnated as a cosmic being, and if I leave without detachment, I will die!"

As soon as he thought of this, Zhang Ling felt a little palpitations.

In the chaos, he had the hope of breaking through to the Heavenly Mandate Realm, but even if he broke through, it was still a weaker Heavenly Mandate Realm, and it was the talent of the Heartbeat Transcendent that made him venture into the universe.

If he succeeds, he will have a bright future, and he will even be able to have a high place in the Tibetan God Organization, and he is even expected to be on a par with His Holiness.

If it fails, it will really fall into the universe.

Zhang Ling didn't think too much about it, and quickly cast a communication formation to connect with the outside world.

Months passed slowly.

this day.

A small crack appeared at the barrier of the universe, and a phantom shadow entered the universe, which was none other than the Venerable of the Tibetan God Organization.

"Zhang Ling has seen His Excellency!"

Zhang Ling said very respectfully.

"It's not bad to become a second-class supreme in the universe, but the foundation is a little worse, but it doesn't have much impact!"

Zun Shang saw through Zhang Ling's details at a glance and said.

"Your Excellency, I would like to report on something. Those supremes of the twelve universe epochs of this universe have hunted down and killed the reincarnated people of our Hidden God Organization, and one of them has fallen into their hands, so he should have been searched for souls, and some information should have been exposed!"

Zhang Ling reported.

"What's going on?"

Venerable asked in a cold voice: "Didn't I let you enter the universe and honestly cultivate in the secret realm, and act in a low-key manner, you must become an Earth Venerable before appearing." With the cultivation of your Earth Venerable, plus the treasures and hole cards left to you, even if the first-class Supreme makes a move, it will be difficult to leave you, how can anyone fall?"

Zhang Ling trembled, and hurriedly explained: "Your Excellency, we don't know. One day, rumors appeared in the universe about our reincarnations, the Tibetan God Organization, and the supremes of the twelve universe epochs began to hunt us down. It is estimated that one of the reincarnated companions was not well hidden, and was squatted by those supremes and was directly captured. As for who was captured, it's hard for us to get in touch with each other, and we can't tell who that companion is!"

Venerable didn't speak, but the cold breath suppressed Zhang Ling.

And the origin of the universe has also descended, locking on the Venerable, constantly rejecting the venerable ghostly consciousness.

"Your Excellency, should we make a move against those Supremes of the Twelve Universe Eras?"

Zhang Ling asked.

"Don't make a move now, besides, with your current strength, can you beat them?" said in a cold voice: "Remember, they are still our partners now, even if they doubt me, it is only suspicion, they will not ruin the plan." But if you make a move and anger them, if you take out that half of the Chaos Arcana and release the Origin of the Universe, then all your plans will be in vain!"

"Your Excellency, I understand!"

Zhang Ling said in a low voice.

"Remember, you can't do it until the two universes are completely merged, understand?"

His Excellency commanded.

"Yes!"

Zhang Ling responded.

"Try to improve your strength, at least to a first-class supreme, otherwise you won't even have the qualifications to participate. The other universe is not simple, and there is no way to do it, there are only these two universes in this vicinity, if you choose other universes, you will not be able to complete the plan for hundreds of millions of years, and you will not even be able to hide from other forces. Therefore, you must be promoted to a first-class supreme before you can hope to deal with the powerful supremes of another universe!"

His Holiness reminded.

"Got it!"

Zhang Ling nodded again and again.
